summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an intimate acoustic set featuring standout performances of Ripple and Bird Song.
review: Reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound and superb transfer quality of this soundboard recording. The acoustic half‑set shines with Jerry in great voice, beautiful harmonies, and memorable moments on Ripple, Bird Song (and a nod to Brokedown Palace). Overall it’s hailed as one of the best acoustic bootlegs available.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are highly favorable (4‑5 ★), praising both the musical performance and the audio fidelity; the show is consistently described as a gem, and the recording is called “awesome” and “the best bootleg,” justifying an almost top‑tier rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear sound; lovely transfer noted by multiple reviewers; no complaints about dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The acoustic set flows beautifully, with intimate vocals and tight harmonies that keep the audience engaged throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: In good voice, encourages sing‑along on Ripple and leads the acoustic vibe.
